episodes.title: Cult of Personality: The Psychology of Political Obedience
episodes.description:
Why do otherwise thoughtful people become loyal to political figures, movements, or narratives that demand total obedience?

In this conversation from the Principles First Summit 2026, the panel explores the psychology behind political obedience, cults of personality, identity, media influence, and the social forces that make democratic vulnerability possible.

Featuring:
Rich Logis, Leaving MAGA
Will Sommer, The Bulwark
Dr. Steven Hassan, Freedom of Mind Resource Center
Laura K. Field, author of Furious Minds
Dr. Maria J. Stephan, Horizons Project

This discussion is for anyone trying to understand political extremism, authoritarian loyalty, deprogramming, media manipulation, and how people begin to question deeply held beliefs.
